job_title: Frontend Engineer, AI Observability & Evals Platform
job_nlp_title: Frontend Engineer, AI Observability & Evals Platform
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
must_have_quals: Front-end engineering experience with strong proficiency in React, JavaScript and TypeScript, Hands-on experience with front-end development tools like Babel, Vite, Webpack, NPM, and Yarn, Familiarity with REST APIs and experience working closely with fullstack and backend engineers, Knowledge of modern authorization mechanisms, such as JWTs, A passion for user experience, design and building clean, engaging, and intuitive interfaces, Strong written and oral communication skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts clearly and concisely to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, The DNA to thrive in a start-up, fast-paced environment. Views unstructured environments as an opportunity to figure out the most impactful work and help define the future success of the company, An ownership mind-set. You are self-driven and look for opportunities to make an impact, Strong computer science fundamentals, ideally with a degree in computer science or related field
core_responsibilities: Develop new user-facing features using React & Typescript, Build reusable components and front-end libraries for future use, Translate designs and wireframes into high-quality code, Optimize components for maximum performance across a vast array of web-capable devices and browsers, Collaborate with fullstack and backend developers and UX/UI designers, to enhance usability
job_summary: LangChain is on a mission to make intelligent agents ubiquitous, providing a platform for building, evaluating, deploying, and operating AI agents at scale. The Frontend Engineer will develop and enhance features on LangSmith, focusing on user-facing components and collaborating with cross-functional teams.
